name: Surgical and Medical Instrument Manufacturing
rationale: Existing ZOLLERN market. High-precision cold-drawn stainless steel profiles (1.4021, 1.4028, 1.4112, 1.4542) for surgical instrument handles, jaw blanks, guide channel inserts, and device frames. Global market ~$65B. Regulatory overlay (FDA 510(k), MDR 2017/745, ISO 10993) adds qualification overhead but is not a knockout.
entryStrategy: Existing market — expand in Tuttlingen instrument cluster and premium OEMs (Aesculap, KLS Martin) via ISO 13485-compatible traceability and biocompatibility documentation.
